notes: British Summertime starts on Sunday 29th March — please put clocks one hour forward. Wintertime Daily Zuhr Jama'at = 1:00pm; Summertime Daily Zuhr Jama'at = 2:00pm. Rows 1–17 are February (up to Ramadhaan); rows 20–31 are March after Ramadhaan. Dates 18–19 (Ramadan period) are not shown in this timetable.
jummah_times: Wintertime: Jumuah Sermon 12:10pm, Jumuah Jama'at 12:45pm; Summertime: Jumuah Sermon 1:10pm, Jumuah
eid_salah: 7:30am & 9:00am. English sermons will start 30 mins before salah
